channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Le MSI Prestige 16 AI+ (Intel Core Ultra Série 3, OLED, 1 To) est un bijou à découvrir pour 400 euros de moins chez Darty
item.description: Avec son système de refroidissement, son autonomie de 30 heures et le puissant Intel Core Ultra Série 3, le MSI Prestige 16 AI+ ne va jamais montrer de faiblesse. Darty propose de le découvrir pour 1 599,99 euros au lieu de 1 999,99 euros.

item.title: Workplaces are pushing out working mothers—and paying the cost
item.description: Research shows motherhood gives women a cognitive edge. Yet workplaces keep pushing them out. Dr. Anne Welsh had her dream job as a clinical psychologist at Harvard University Health Services, working with undergraduate and graduate students. But in 2011, while pregnant with her second child and raising a toddler at home, she decided that her 60-client caseload was no longer sustainable....

item.title: How to watch Euphoria season 3 online – stream Zendaya & Sydney Sweeney drama from anywhere
item.description: Discover what has become of Rue, Cassie, Nate and the rest. Here’s how you can watch Euphoria season 3 online wherever you are and potentially for free.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for April 12, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.
